scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:cli
scripts.build:web: bun run --cwd ../../packages/react build && bun run --cwd ../../packages/ui build && bun run ./build-web.ts && ../../node_modules/.bin/tailwindcss -i ./web/app.css -o ./public/assets/styles.css --minify && cp node_modules/katex/dist/katex.min.css ./public/assets/katex.min.css && mkdir -p ./public/assets/fonts && cp node_modules/katex/dist/fonts/* ./public/assets/fonts/
scripts.dev: bun run dev:build && bun run dev:watch
scripts.dev:build: bun run --cwd ../../packages/api build:js && bun run --cwd ../../packages/react build:js && bun run --cwd ../../packages/ui build:js && bun run ./build-web.ts && ../../node_modules/.bin/tailwindcss -i ./web/app.css -o ./public/assets/styles.css && cp node_modules/katex/dist/katex.min.css ./public/assets/katex.min.css && mkdir -p ./public/assets/fonts && cp node_modules/katex/dist/fonts/* ./public/assets/fonts/
scripts.dev:watch: bun run --cwd ../../packages/api watch & bun run --cwd ../../packages/react watch & bun run --cwd ../../packages/ui watch & bun run ./build-web.ts --watch & ../../node_modules/.bin/tailwindcss -i ./web/app.css -o ./public/assets/styles.css --watch & bun run --hot src/server.ts
